recommendations.title: Secondhand Lions
recommendations.overview: The comedic adventures of an introverted boy left on the doorstep of a pair of reluctant, eccentric great-uncles, whose exotic remembrances stir the boy's spirit and re-ignite the men's lives.

recommendations.title: Heyy Babyy
recommendations.overview: Three womanisers find a baby left at their doorstep. Chaos ensues as they try to contact their former girlfriends to determine who is the father amongst them.

recommendations.title: Right at Your Door
recommendations.overview: A dirty bomb goes off in Los Angeles, jamming freeways and spreading a toxic cloud.

recommendations.title: Baby Face
recommendations.overview: A young woman uses her body and her sexuality to help her climb the social ladder, but soon begins to wonder if her new status will ever bring her happiness.

recommendations.title: Joshua Tree
recommendations.overview: A Los Angeles police detective tracks a fugitive who heads for the desert with a deputy sheriff as hostage.

recommendations.title: The Zone
recommendations.overview: Residents of an enclosed neighborhood in the middle of Mexico DF are shocked by a violent crime, and for one resident in particular, young Alejandro, the drama is ratcheted up when he encounters the lone kid who escaped the event and is hiding out wi

recommendations.title: Blood and Bone
recommendations.overview: In Los Angeles, an ex-con takes the underground fighting world by storm in his quest to fulfill a promise to a dead friend.

recommendations.title: Blast from the Past
recommendations.overview: Following a bomb scare in the 1960s that locked the Webers into their bomb shelter for 35 years, Adam now ventures forth into Los Angeles to obtain food and supplies for his family, and a non-mutant wife for himself.

recommendations.title: Disaster L.A.: The Last Zombie Apocalypse Begins Here
recommendations.overview: After a meteor shower strikes Los Angeles, toxic smoke is released across the city causing people to physically change and become violent. A small group of survivors plans to vacate the city by heading to the coast.

recommendations.title: Panic in Year Zero!
recommendations.overview: While on a fishing trip, Harry Baldwin and his family hear an explosion and realize that Los Angeles has been leveled by a nuclear attack. Looters and killers are everywhere. Escaping to the hills with his family, he sets about the business of surviv
